content:
My name is John, and I’m a software engineer living in Fremont, CA, with my wife, two sons, and a pitbull named Charlie. I’ve lived in Florida, Texas, and California, as well as Shanghai, Hangzhou, and Changchun. I speak English and Chinese, and hope to pick up a few more languages before my race is run.
In my day job, I write a lot of C, and prefer it to most other programming languages. At night I read and watch too much TV, and try to walk as much as I can.
I’m an Everton supporter and a St. Louis Cardinals fan. I care about their fortunes far too much for my own good.
 “So if you sinful people know how to give good gifts to your children, how much more will your heavenly Father give the Holy Spirit to those who ask him.” (Luke 11:13)
 Contact links in the footer, would love to hear from you.
title: About

content:
I haven’t maintained a blog for some time now, for no real reason at all except that I didn’t have the will to write, or really to do much of anything. It’s been a rough couple of years–not just COVID, but starting before that and amplified by COVID. I’m trying to dig my way out of that funk, and one of the ways I’m doing that is by starting to write again.
I have some things to write about–I’m learning Russian, and I have some side projects going here and there–and I might try to import some of the better posts from old blogs into this one. More than anything I want to get back into the habit of writing, as it’s one of the things that has kept me centered in the past.
Hope all of you are having a good 2021.
description: Dipping my toes back into blogging.
title: Hello Again, World
